analysis_population.exclusion_rule: reuse the frozen Record160 rule excluded_no_successful_source; no new or post-hoc exclusion is allowed

bootstrap.stream_derivation: base seed XOR first 64 bits of SHA-256(source NUL metric)

comparison_family.family_definition: the four leave-one-source-out comparisons within each preregistered metric

identity.diagnostic_identity: SHA-256 of the unified identity profile; no paper identifiers or titles are emitted

metrics.source_contribution_scope: successful frozen response papers after production identity deduplication and before the global candidate limit
metrics.top20_scope: production current_rules relevance selection after ranking, capped at 20

ranking.candidate_merge: frozen logical call order, production unified identity deduplication, then production stable source-coverage truncation
ranking.full_reconstruction: must exactly match frozen initial_deduplicated, initial_judged, initial_reranked and final_returned stages for every included query

statistical_unit.component_effect: query-equal mean within each frozen component
statistical_unit.estimand: equal mean over frozen connected components
statistical_unit.membership: reuse component_id from the frozen query assignment file without recomputation

terminal_semantics.main_inclusion: at least one configured source has at least one authoritative success Snapshot
terminal_semantics.source_state: success, partial_failure, failed, or not_started; timeout is failure and cooldown without a Snapshot is not_started
terminal_semantics.subquery_timeout: a zero-candidate timeout before source dispatch remains an unassigned terminal and is never attributed to a source

warnings: Coverage and rank stability are not relevance, Precision, Recall, or an official score.
Frozen source failures remain in the fixed 160-query population and are not used for post-hoc filtering.
Full1000 completeness is outside this analysis.
